metaData.Key Information:
• Provides instant soothing relief and long lasting comfort for all contact lens wearers
• Relieves dryness and irritation
• Suitable for use with all types of contact lenses including disposables
metaData.Preparation:
• Place 1 or 2 drops in each affected eye
• Use as required
• No need to remove contact lenses
• For extra comfort, place 1 or 2 drops in each lens before inserting
Precautions:
• Do not swallow solution
• Do not use if allergic reaction to any of the ingredients
• To avoid contamination, do not touch bottle tip on any surface, avoid direct contact with eye
• Close bottle tightly immediately after use
• Discard any remaining solution 60 days after opening
• Do not use after expiry date
• If you have continued problems please discuss with your lens care practitioner
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of the reach of children
• Store at room temperature

metaData.Ingredients:
Carboxymethylcellulose sodium, Calcium Chloride, Magnesium Chloride, Potassium Chloride, Purified Water, Sodium Chloride, and Sodium Lactate
• May contain hydrochloric acid and/or sodium hydroxide to adjust pH
metaData.Key Information:
• Provides immediate, long-lasting relief plus protection from dryness and irritation
• Protects against further irritation with its long-lasting lubricant
• Preservative free
• Provides 24 hour comfort for dry, irritated eyes
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Completely twist off tab, do not pull off
2. Instill 1 or 2 drops in the affected eye(s) and discard container
• Warnings:
1. To avoid contamination, do not touch tip of container on to any surface
2. Do not touch unit-does tip to eye
3. Do not reuse, once opened, discard
4. Stop usage and ask a doctor if you experience eye pain, changes in vision, continued redness or irritation of the eye, or if the condition worsens or persists for more than 72 hours
5. Do not use in case of hypersensitivity to one or more of the ingredients
6. Use only if single-use container is intact
7. Do not use if solution changes color or becomes cloudy

metaData.Ingredients: Potassium L-Aspartate, Potassium Chloride, Calcium Chloride Hydrate, Sodium Chloride, Glucose, Magnesium Sulfate Hydrate, Dibasic Sodium Phosphate Hydrate, Disodium Edetate Hydrate, Dried Sodium Carbonate, Benzalkonium Chloride Solution, Sterile Purified Water
metaData.Key Information: Ganryojun Eye Drops works and clears like natural tears.

metaData.Key Information: Eye Mo Moist moisturises and refreshes eyes which have become dry and tired through reading, prolonged computer usage and exposure to wind or air-conditioning that causes dryness.

metaData.Key Information: Makes breathing feel clear and cool.
metaData.Preparation:
Caution:
• Use only with head in an upright position
• For external use only

product.description: If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away. For use in the eyes only.

metaData.Ingredients:
Boric Acid, Sodium Borate and Sodium Chloride, Hydrochloric Acid and / or Sodium Hydroxide may be used to adjust pH
• Preservative Added: Edetate Disodium 0.025% and Sorbic Acid 0.1%
metaData.Key Information:
• Cleans, refreshes, soothes
• For daily or emergency eye cleansing
• Sterile eye cup enclosed
• With improved cup design
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For use with nozzle applicator:
1. Flush the affected eye(s) as needed
2. Control the rate of flow of solution by pressure on the bottle
3. Do not touch dropper tip to eye
• Important:
1. Remove contact lenses before using
2. Do not touch tip of container to any surface to avoid contamination
3. Replace cap after use
• Ask a doctor if:
1. Experience eye pain, changes in vision, continued redness or irritation of the eyes
2. Condition worsens or persists
Warnings:
• Do not use if:
1. Have open wounds in or near the eyes and get medical help right away
2. Solution changes colour or becomes cloudy
• Using an eye cup:
1. Rinse the cup with Bausch & Lomb Eye Wash immediately before each use
2. Avoid contamination of the rim and inside surfaces of the cup
3. Fill the cup half full with Bausch & Lomb Eye Wash Solution and apply the cup to the affected eye(s), pressing tightly to prevent spillage
4. Tilt the head backward, open eyelids wide and rotate eyeball to thoroughly wash the eye
5. Rinse cup with clean water after each use
6. Replace cap after use
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of reach of children
• Store at 15°C - 29°C
• Use before expiration date marked on the carton or bottle
